sections.paragraph:
δημηγορέω impf. ἐδημηγόρουν (s. δῆμος, ἀγορεύω ‘speak in the assembly’; Aristoph., Lysias et al.; Pr 30:31; 4 Macc 5:15; Jos., Bell. 2, 619, Vi. 92) deliver a public address πρός τινα Ac 12:21—DELG s.v. δῆμος.

impf. impf. = imperfect

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

Lysias Lysias , V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 222
